pi_items.verified_value: Solent - A real maritime strait between Isle of Wight and mainland England, approximately latitude 50.785, longitude -1.290
COLREGS Rule 14 (head-on), Rule 15 (crossing), Rule 13 (overtaking), and Vessel Restricted in Ability to Manoeuvre are all real COLREGS concepts
pi_items.source: Web search results from COLREGS documentation: https://www.navcen.uscg.gov/sites/default/files/pdf/navRules/navrules.pdf and https://www.ecolregs.com/

pi_items.verified_value: Consistent with Solent maritime area. Port Solent coordinates are 50.842991 (which exceeds upper bound), but Solent center is at ~50.785 latitude
Port Solent is at -1.101002 longitude, which falls within this range. Solent center is at ~-1.290 longitude
These keywords correspond to actual COLREGS rules and encounter types
pi_items.source: COLREGS documentation and official sources confirm Rules 13 (overtaking), 14 (head-on), and 15 (crossing)

pi_items.metadata_value: Task description mentions 'maritime training instructor at Warsash Maritime School'
pi_items.verified_value: Warsash Maritime School is a real maritime training institution that provides COLREGS training and operates the UK's largest maritime simulation centre
pi_items.source: Web search: https://maritime.solent.ac.uk/ and Wikipedia article on Warsash Maritime School

pi_items.verified_value: Bridge Command is a real, open-source 3D ship bridge and radar simulator released under GPL v2. It includes navigation, radar, ARPA, and ship handling simulation

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a nighttime COLREGS training scenario in Bridge Command simulator for the Solent, a real maritime area in southern England (latitude ~50.77-50.82, longitude ~-1.10 to -1.20). The scenario must include four vessels representing COLREGS Rules 13 (overtaking), 14 (head-on), and 15 (crossing) encounters, plus a vessel with restricted manoeuvrability. Warsash Maritime School is a real maritime training institution. Bridge Command is a real open-source ship simulator with configurable ARPA radar (arpa_on, full_radar settings are valid). However, the settings 'radar_range_resolution' and 'max_radar_range' do not appear in official Bridge Command bc5.ini documentation and their validity is unconfirmed.
